reviews.body: Just renewed for the 2nd time. Terms agreeable so did not feel the need to look elsewhere. The admin was very slick and efficient.

My Bond matured on 16 th October 2025 . I filled n the form , expressing my wishes (reinvest some and a cheque for the rest). I didn’t receive any confirmation that my pass book and form had been received.Then last Tuesday I had an email from MBS thanking me for reinvesting and asking How did we do?. At this point I had received no comms, no passbook and no cheque. On Friday 7th November I decided to visit the Mansfield branch. I was told that a cheque had been posted to me on 4th , and a suggestion was made that I wait till the following Monday , as it might come then. (Which it did). So in summary I’m disappointed with communication-and I think I should have had my cheque straight after the maturity date not today the 10th november

Haven’t had any issues with Mansfield. The one thing I really like about them is they answer the phone pretty quickly and it’s always someone who can speak good English and understand good Scottish. Ideally I’d like to be paying a bit less every month but who wouldn’t?
Friendly helpful approachable team. Kept us well informed. We are only redeeming as we have sold the property.
High rate so decided to move. No issues with the experience itself.
The documents I received made things very clear, and I was able to use the website easily to renew my mortgage.
I haven’t really had any experience yet with Mansfield BS other than the mortgage offer.
The experience of having a mortgage with the Mansfield has been good on the whole.

Staff very friendly and always helpful. We paid for a valuation through yourselves and we were not happy with the valuation given it was £40k less then we have been told from our own evaluation and was considerably less in comparison to recent house sales on our street. Obviously the more equity in your house the better the internet rate so we feel a little cheated. We have renewed with you for a fixed 2 yrs as time was ticking and we just wanted an easy renewal this time round.

Excelent personalised service.  I rang with an urgent question about setting up a trust account and was called back promptly.  It was great to then be able to contact Tony Harrison directly with my queries.  He was very responsive and helpful - due to waiting for confirmation of a house completion date i could only give him short notice to set up the account.  I really liked the very human service.
We have found them friendly among many things as well as helpful

I find it frustrating that when I want to open a new account as I just have I have to hand in the application form and then wait till I get confirmation through the post to actually fund it causing me to have to return to branch.
